name: Cascade Armory 0 Sticker Pack
description:
Turn your favorite rifles and pistols into pocket-sized art with the Cascade Armory 0 sticker pack. Featuring five unique firearm designs from the Cascade Armory collection, this pack is perfect for slapping on ammo cans, water bottles, range cases, or your laptop.

Each sticker is printed on durable, weatherproof vinyl with a matte finish for a clean, tactical look.

Includes:

ACR – Decked out with a red battleworn finish
AK-104 – Green classic with a rugged vibe
MP5 – Loaded with subsonic ammo and a sleek two-tone look
Staccato C2 – Cyberpunk 2077 Trauma Team inspired sidearm
Beretta M9 – Clean and minimalist
Specs:

5 premium vinyl stickers
Matte finish, water & UV resistant
Sizes range 2"-4" (longest dimension)
Designed and printed in the USA

name: Cascade Anime Collection - Echo ACR
description:
Available in two unique colors, Echo sports a custom Templar Precision ACR and is ready for a match win!

This high quality regular fit tee has a casually elegant vibe. Additionally, unbelievably soft tri-blend fabric makes it extremely comfortable - once put on, impossible to take off.

.: 50% polyester, 25% combed ringspun cotton, 25% rayon
.: Light Fabric (4.3 oz/yd² (146 g/m²))
.: Regular fit
.: Sewn-in label
